ops.body: Input for the E14 futility rule from the 2026-07-19 P6 campaign close (816d610): the score-watcher instrument's between-run band is ~0.0146 sentinel-AUC measured clean — identical recipe/commit/seed/spec-digest baselines scored 0.9326 (morning) vs 0.9180 (afternoon, post nightly-accrual). Any futility threshold on this instrument must sit well above that band; per-verdict margins of ~0.001 (both campaign verdicts) are pure noise. Prerequisite for E14: a repeat-scoring noise-floor estimate (k invocations of one recipe) so the futility rule can be stated in units of measured σ, not raw AUC deltas. Also per the operator steer, the futility design should weigh effort: the metric has no cost axis, so futility should trigger on cost-normalized progress.
